system.description: When you Eliminate or kill a target, you may release a perfect copy of that target as a Trophy and roll [quality].

outcomes.success: the Trophy will behave exactly as the target normally would, with their personality and memory intact as if you had not interacted with them, until a time within 24 hours you define. That time can be defined by conditions rather than exact moments (“when the cargo arrives,” “once the room empties out,” “after you’ve seen three cats”). When that time arrives, they will be killed or Eliminated as the target was, suddenly and violently.
outcomes.eachplus3: you may choose an additional target near the Trophy at the time of its detonation to be killed or Eliminated as well. These additional targets are considered killed or Eliminated by your Gun for the purposes of your other Anomaly Abilities.
outcomes.failure: the target will behave as normal and detonate at a time you did not decide, which could be at any point between now and a year from now. They are immune to any future effects from your Gun.

improvement.question: Only you can answer this question. Be prepared for serious consequences if you do. Do you regret it?
